hero.headline: I build complete business systems, not just websites.
hero.lead: Laravel and PHP on the backend. React and Next.js on the frontend. React Native and Flutter on mobile. I design and ship SaaS platforms, ERP and CRM systems, CMS, dashboards, APIs, and mobile apps — built for real businesses and real production load.
hero.headlineV2: I build production-ready systems for real businesses.
hero.leadV2: Full-stack developer with 3+ years of experience building Laravel backends, React/Next.js interfaces, mobile apps, dashboards, APIs, SaaS, ERP and CRM platforms.

hero.heading: Engineering services for complete business systems.
hero.lead: From a single component to a full product ecosystem — frontend, backend, mobile, dashboards, APIs, and deployment. Every engagement is shipped to production with clean architecture and operator-grade tooling.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Systems
fullstack.description: End-to-end product builds: data model, API, dashboard, and mobile — designed and shipped as a single coherent system.
fullstack.deliver: Data model, API, dashboard, and mobile app as one shipped system.
fullstack.value: One team owns the whole stack — no integration gaps.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: Modern React and Next.js interfaces with TypeScript, Tailwind, smooth motion, accessible patterns, and design-system rigor.
frontend.deliver: Typed React/Next.js UI, a design system, and polished motion.
frontend.value: Interfaces that feel fast, accessible, and on-brand.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Laravel and PHP services with clean domain models, queues, role-aware authorization, and well-defined REST contracts.
backend.deliver: Laravel domain services, auth, queues, and REST contracts.
backend.value: A backend that scales and stays maintainable.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps with React Native or Flutter — wired into the same production API as the web.
mobile.deliver: React Native / Flutter apps on iOS and Android.
mobile.value: Reach customers on every device from one codebase.

saas.title: SaaS Platforms
saas.description: Multi-tenant products with subscriptions, billing, role-based access, notifications, and a clean operator console.
saas.deliver: Multi-tenant app, billing, roles, and an operator console.
saas.value: A product you can sell, scale, and operate from day one.

erp.title: ERP Systems
erp.description: Internal operating systems for inventory, invoicing, employees, accounting, and reporting — built around your real workflow.
erp.deliver: Inventory, invoicing, accounting, and reporting modules.
erp.value: Run operations from one system instead of spreadsheets.

crm.title: CRM Systems
crm.description: Customer pipelines, lifecycle automation, and operator dashboards on top of a clean, queryable data model.
crm.deliver: Pipelines, lifecycle automation, and operator dashboards.
crm.value: Never lose a lead or a follow-up again.

cms.title: CMS Platforms
cms.description: Editorial systems with structured content, media management, role-aware publishing, and multi-language support.
cms.deliver: Structured content, media, roles, and multi-language publishing.
cms.value: Your team ships content without touching code.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboards
dashboard.description: Operator-grade dashboards with KPIs, filters, exports, audit trails, and role-aware UI — built for daily real use.
dashboard.deliver: KPIs, filters, exports, audit trails, and role-aware UI.
dashboard.value: Operators get clarity and control in real time.

api.title: API Development
api.description: Versioned REST APIs, service contracts, webhooks, queues, and integration layers designed for long-term evolution.
api.deliver: Versioned REST APIs, webhooks, queues, and integration layers.
api.value: One contract that powers web, mobile, and partners.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Platforms
ecommerce.description: Storefronts, catalogs, checkout, payments, and order operations — built as one system, not stitched plugins.
ecommerce.deliver: Catalog, checkout, payments, and order operations.
ecommerce.value: Sell online with a system built to grow, not a plugin pile.

ai.title: AI Integrations
ai.description: LLM features integrated into real product surfaces — chat, automation, content tools — with cost-aware design and prompt caching.
ai.deliver: LLM features wired into real product surfaces, cost-aware.
ai.value: Automation and intelligence where it actually moves metrics.

performance.title: Performance Optimization
performance.description: Audits and targeted fixes across frontend, backend, and database — bundle size, query plans, indexing, caching, image pipelines.
performance.deliver: Audits and targeted fixes across frontend, backend, and database.
performance.value: Faster pages, cheaper infra, happier users.

deployment.title: Deployment & Production Setup
deployment.description: Production hosting, environment configuration, CI builds, error logging, and zero-secret-in-source pipelines.
deployment.deliver: Hosting, CI builds, env config, logging, and safe rollbacks.
deployment.value: Ship safely and sleep through the night.

meta.title: About — Ahmed Alaydi
meta.description: Engineering background, principles, and the systems Ahmed Alaydi designs and ships — SaaS, ERP, CRM, dashboards, APIs, and mobile.

hero.heading: Full-stack engineering with a production mindset.
hero.lead: I build scalable business platforms with Laravel, React, and Next.js, focusing on clean architecture, responsive interfaces, and systems that are ready for real users.

profile.heading: Building digital systems that stay useful after launch.
profile.p1: I work across the stack, from Laravel APIs and MySQL schemas to React and Next.js interfaces. My focus is building systems that are easy to use, easy to extend, and stable in real production workflows.
profile.p2: I have worked on admin platforms, CMS dashboards, booking experiences, corporate websites, and business tools where design quality and backend structure both matter.

architecture.title: Clean Architecture
architecture.description: I structure applications so UI, APIs, services, and data layers stay maintainable as the product grows.

performance.title: Performance Mindset
performance.description: From frontend rendering to database queries, I look for practical optimizations that improve real user experience.

production.title: Production Readiness
production.description: I build with authentication, reliability, permissions, deployment, and long-term operations in mind.

outcomes.title: Business Outcomes
outcomes.description: Dashboards, CMS platforms, and APIs are designed around workflows, not just visual screens.

highlights.heading: Experience Highlights
items: Laravel APIs with MySQL data modeling
Dynamic CMS platforms and media workflows

meta.title: Skills — Engineering Capabilities
meta.description: An engineering capability profile: full-stack architecture, mobile apps, APIs, dashboards, deployment, performance, and the stack behind it (Laravel, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript).

hero.heading: A complete engineering profile, not a stack list.
hero.lead: From data models to dashboards, mobile apps to deployment — these are the capabilities I bring to production systems every day.

hero2.headline: I build production systems,
hero2.lead: A full-stack engineer focused on shipping SaaS platforms, ERP / CRM systems, dashboards, mobile apps, and the APIs that hold them together.

sectionHeaders.pillarsTitle: What I bring to a system

mobile.heading: React Native + Flutter
mobile.lead: Cross-platform apps that share API contracts with the web dashboard. Real-time state, native push, payments, geolocation, and biometric flows — wired into the same backend that powers the business.

cta.heading: Need a system engineered end-to-end?
cta.lead: Dashboard, mobile apps, APIs, deployment — designed as one cohesive system.

hero.lead: Three-plus years shipping full-stack platforms: SaaS, ERP, CRM, dashboards, and the mobile apps and APIs that connect them. I don't hand off pieces — I own the whole system end to end.

core.title: What I engineer end to end

frontend.title: Frontend Engineering
frontend.body: Composable React & Next.js interfaces with strict typing, motion, and design systems built to scale.

backend.title: Backend Architecture
backend.body: Laravel services, policies, queues, and event-driven domains engineered for real production load.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.body: React Native & Flutter apps on iOS and Android, wired to the same live backend as the web.

api.title: API Engineering
api.body: Versioned, authenticated REST APIs that serve web, mobile, and partner clients from one contract.

dashboards.title: Dashboard Systems
dashboards.body: Operator-grade admin panels: fast tables, role-aware actions, approvals, exports, and reporting.

saas.title: SaaS Platforms
saas.body: Multi-tenant products with billing, onboarding, and the operational tooling that runs them.

erpcrm.title: ERP / CRM Systems
erpcrm.body: Inventory, POS, pipelines, and reporting tuned for real operational throughput.

perf.title: Performance Optimization
perf.body: Indexed queries, lean bundles, and cached endpoints — fast by default and always measured.

customer.title: Customer Apps
customer.body: Browse, checkout, and real-time order tracking in a localized, native interface.

delivery.title: Delivery Apps
delivery.body: Live assignment, native maps handoff, and proof-of-delivery capture for couriers.

admin.title: Admin Apps
admin.body: KPI cards, an approval inbox, a broadcast composer, and biometric unlock.

backend.title: Backend Integration
backend.body: Shared REST contracts with the web dashboard — one source of truth for every client.

realtime.title: Real-Time Systems
realtime.body: Push, sockets, and webhooks keep every client reconciled to live state.

push.title: Push Notifications
push.body: Targeted FCM delivery for orders, alerts, and lifecycle events.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Native checkout and gateway integration with verified webhook settlement.

maps.title: Maps / Geolocation
maps.body: Live tracking, routing, and location handoff across delivery flows.

maintainability.title: Maintainability
maintainability.body: Code the next engineer can change without fear.

clean.title: Clean Architecture
clean.body: Explicit boundaries between domain, application, and infrastructure.

scalable.title: Scalable Systems
scalable.body: Right-sized today, designed so growth never forces a rewrite.

apifirst.title: API-First Thinking
apifirst.body: The API is the product; web, mobile, and partners all consume it.

deployment.title: Production Deployment
deployment.body: Ship-able from day one — CI, env scoping, migrations, observability.

optimization.title: Optimization Mindset
optimization.body: Measure, profile, then optimize. Never premature, always intentional.

reusable.title: Reusable Components
reusable.body: Primitives and contracts that compose across products.
